steps.title: Find the base a from the given condition
steps.content: Use $g(3) = 1088$ with the given function $g(x) = 17 \cdot a^x$. Substituting: $$17 \cdot a^3 = 1088$$ Divide by 17: $$a^3 = 64$$ Take the cube root: $$a = 4$$

steps.title: Calculate g(4) using the exponential relationship
steps.content: In an exponential function, each unit increase in the exponent multiplies the output by the base $a$. Therefore: $$g(4) = g(3) \cdot a = 1088 \cdot 4 = 4352$$
